rationale: Obligation: forall r1,r2:HashMap<V>, (r1@==empty && r2@==empty) ==> r1==r2. HashMap is #[verifier(external_body)] with an uninterp view() and no #[verifier::ext_equal] attribute, so view equality cannot imply structural equality r1==r2. Tried: direct assert(r1==r2); assert(r1 =~= r2); assert ... by(compute); case-splitting via 'if' to bring antecedent into scope, then chaining transitivity through Map::empty(). All failed because no axiom relates the uninterp view to == on the opaque struct. Without assume() (forbidden), this is unprovable from the given declarations.
